sources.writer_profile: Food writer Maria contributes to Barcelona Food Experience, a publication dedicated to exploring the vibrant culinary scene of Barcelona. Her work includes comprehensive food guides that help readers navigate the city's diverse dining landscape.

A seasoned food writer for Beteve, Carmen Cortés Vidal specializes in comprehensive restaurant guides that help diners navigate the local culinary scene. Her expertise shines through detailed food guides that showcase the best dining experiences in the region.

Food writer Paula Mourenza contributes to Culinary Backstreets, a publication that explores authentic local food cultures and hidden culinary gems around the world. She specializes in creating comprehensive food guides that help travelers and food enthusiasts discover off-the-beaten-path dining experiences. Her work focuses on uncovering the stories behind neighborhood eateries and traditional food scenes that define local communities.

Food writer Eric Morgado contributes to Gastronosfera, a publication focused on culinary exploration and dining experiences. His recent work includes comprehensive food guides that help readers discover noteworthy restaurants and culinary destinations.

Food writer at The New Barcelona Post, Anna Torrents specializes in creating comprehensive dining guides for Barcelona's culinary scene. Her recent work includes detailed food guides that help readers discover the city's diverse restaurant landscape. The New Barcelona Post features her expertise in navigating Barcelona's dynamic food culture.

Food writer P. Ribot contributes to The New Barcelona Post through the Baco & Boca column, focusing on culinary guides and restaurant discoveries. The publication covers Barcelona's dining scene, with Ribot's recent work including comprehensive food guides for the city's evolving restaurant landscape.

Food writer Stefania Talento contributes to In and Out Barcelona, a publication focused on Barcelona's dining and culinary scene. Her recent work includes comprehensive food guides that help readers navigate the city's restaurant landscape.

Food writer for Guía Repsol, Spain's prestigious culinary guide that showcases exceptional restaurants and gastronomic experiences. Lourdes López contributes expert restaurant reviews and dining recommendations to help food enthusiasts discover outstanding culinary destinations across Spain.

Food writer for The Infatuation, contributing expert guides that help diners discover notable restaurants and dining experiences. Isabelle Kliger specializes in creating comprehensive food guides that showcase the best culinary destinations and hidden gems in the dining scene.

restaurants.name: Pompa
restaurants.description: Hake pil-pil made with cheeks and exceptional cheese and charcuterie selection; the casual sibling of Berbena that became one of 2025's most talked-about neighbourhood openings.
restaurants.quote: Hake pil-pil made with cheeks and an exceptional cheese and charcuterie selection; the casual sibling of Berbena that has become a neighbourhood essential.

restaurants.name: Franca
restaurants.description: Reworks traditional Catalan dishes in compelling modern ways; curious and different—one of 2025's most exciting and original special-occasion openings.
restaurants.quote: 'Curious and different' special-occasion restaurant; one of 2025's most distinctive openings for those seeking something genuinely original in Eixample.

restaurants.name: Arraval
restaurants.description: Mediterranean design with reinterpreted Catalan dishes with personality; urban, spice-forward traditional cooking that made it one of the most admired Raval openings of 2025.
restaurants.quote: Mediterranean design with 'reinterpreted Catalan dishes with personality'; one of the most admired new restaurants of 2025 in the Raval.

restaurants.name: Fukamura
restaurants.description: Omakase Japanese restaurant at Còrsega 479 offering a ceremonial chef's selection tasting menu; one of Barcelona's most talked-about Japanese dining experiences of 2025.
restaurants.quote: A ceremonial Japanese omakase experience that became one of 2025's most-discussed new restaurants among Barcelona food writers.

restaurants.name: Sophie Kai
restaurants.description: A Barcelona perspective on contemporary Japan: approachable, aesthetic, fresh and honest. Gyoza, teriyaki skewers, kimchi croquettes, and white chocolate matcha tiramisu at Rec Comtal 12.
restaurants.quote: Recently relaunched by Banco de Boquerones group; intimate spaces with distinct colour zones; philosophy 'a Barcelona perspective on contemporary Japan: approachable, aesthetic, fresh and honest.' Gyoza, teriyaki skewers, and white chocolate matcha tiramisu.

restaurants.name: Fino Bar
restaurants.description: Innovative, yet down-to-earth small plates at this Gràcia bar on Torrent de les Flors; Andalusian-Catalan flavours executed with a personal, unfussy touch.
restaurants.quote: Small plates and traditional fare at Torrent de les Flors 113; recommended as a pre- or post-cinema stop near Cinema Phenomena in Gràcia.

restaurants.name: Finorri
restaurants.description: Cantabrian anchovies, seasonal mushrooms, and rice bursting with fresh seafood; territory-focused Catalan cooking near La Boqueria and the Liceu opera house.
restaurants.quote: Cantabrian anchovies, seasonal mushrooms, and rice bursting with fresh seafood; upscale Spanish-Catalan cooking in a Gothic Quarter setting.

restaurants.name: Bornès
restaurants.description: Updated traditional Catalan cuisine paired with contemporary cocktails at Carassa 2 in the Born; a neighbourhood restaurant that found its audience quickly in 2025.
restaurants.quote: Updated traditional Catalan cuisine paired with contemporary cocktails; a neighbourhood Born restaurant that found its audience quickly in 2025.

restaurants.name: Bar Cañete
restaurants.description: Quality seafood tapas at this well-regarded Raval institution on Carrer Unió 17; consistently one of the most reliable bars in the area.
restaurants.quote: Well-regarded Raval tapas bar at Carrer Unió 17; recommended as a top dining option near La Filmoteca cinema.

restaurants.name: Tapas 24
restaurants.description: Carles Abellán's iconic gourmet tapas bar at Diputació 269; home of the truffle biquini sandwich—a dish the chef made entirely his own over 20 years of cooking.
restaurants.quote: Chef Carles Abellán describes himself as 'un home de barra enamorat de les tapes'; his iconic truffle biquini sandwich originated at El Bulli with Ferran Adrià.

restaurants.name: Lora
restaurants.description: Fattoush salad that crunches and bursts with freshness, and shoulder of lamb glazed in pomegranate; the SLS Barcelona hotel restaurant that stood out as 2025's top brunch destination.
restaurants.quote: Fattoush salad that crunches and bursts with freshness, and a shoulder of lamb glazed in pomegranate; the SLS Barcelona hotel restaurant that earned its place on the hit list.

restaurants.name: Casa Fiero
restaurants.description: 1970s diner throwback featuring French bistro classics and upscale tapas; known for the decadent, gratinated macaroni and a social, energetic atmosphere.
restaurants.quote: 1970s diner throwback featuring French bistro classics and upscale tapas; known for the decadent, gratinated macaroni that keeps regulars coming back.

restaurants.name: Cerveseria 640
restaurants.description: Sister to Colmado Wilmot offering classic tapas served fried, grilled, or raw with zero fuss; impeccable execution in a spacious beer-hall setting.
restaurants.quote: Sister location to Colmado Wilmot offering classic tapas served fried, grilled, or raw with zero fuss in a spacious beer-hall setting.

restaurants.name: Ultramarinos Marín
restaurants.description: Owners Borja Garcia and Adria Castro prepare cured fish and grilled leg of lamb using refined curing, pickling, and roasting techniques—traditional dishes without unnecessary flourishes.
restaurants.quote: Hybrid bar, butcher, and charcuterie temple; representative of the charcuterie-forward dining trend that defined Barcelona's 2025 food scene.

restaurants.name: Trü
restaurants.description: Chef Artur Martínez presents a short menu of Catalan recipes in tapas version with personal interpretation; features trinxat and mollejas at Còrsega 232.
restaurants.quote: Chef Artur Martínez presents a short menu of Catalan recipes in tapas version with personal interpretation; features trinxat and mollejas at Còrsega 232.

restaurants.name: Berbena
restaurants.description: Seasonal, local ingredients come together with great precision at this Gràcia restaurant; everything works in perfect harmony across the menu.
restaurants.quote: Seasonal, local ingredients come together with great precision at this Gràcia restaurant; the kitchen works in perfect harmony with its neighbourhood feel.

restaurants.name: Âme
restaurants.description: Blends French culinary technique with Mediterranean flavours in a warm, welcoming Eixample Esquerra setting.
restaurants.quote: Blends French culinary technique with Mediterranean flavours in a warm, welcoming Eixample Esquerra setting.

restaurants.name: Besta
restaurants.description: Creative seafood dishes paired with a strong natural wine selection; one of Eixample Esquerra's most essential addresses.
restaurants.quote: Creative seafood dishes paired with a strong natural wine selection make this Eixample Esquerra spot essential.

restaurants.name: Suru Bar
restaurants.description: Unusual ingredient combinations that remain approachable and exciting; one of Eixample Esquerra's most interesting new tables.
restaurants.quote: Unusual ingredient combinations that somehow remain approachable and exciting; one of Eixample Esquerra's most interesting new tables.

restaurants.name: El Rectangle
restaurants.description: Young, exciting cooking described as thrilling and approachable; captures the energy of the Sant Antoni dining scene right now.
restaurants.quote: Young, exciting cooking described as thrilling and approachable; captures the energy of the Sant Antoni dining scene right now.

restaurants.name: Bardeni
restaurants.description: Chef-driven approach to meat with quality and technique at the forefront; a serious address for carnivores in Eixample Dreta.
restaurants.quote: Chef-driven approach to meat with quality and technique at the forefront; a serious address for carnivores in Eixample Dreta.

restaurants.name: Maleducat
restaurants.description: Captures the energy and spirit of Barcelona right now; one of the most alive spots in Sant Antoni's buzzing dining scene.
restaurants.quote: Captures the energy and spirit of Barcelona right now; one of the most alive spots in Sant Antoni's buzzing dining scene.

restaurants.name: Alapar
restaurants.description: Confident cooking with clear direction combines Mediterranean and Japanese cuisines with impressive, cohesive results in Poble Sec.
restaurants.quote: Confident cooking with clear direction combines two cuisines—Mediterranean and Japanese—with impressive, cohesive results in Poble Sec.

restaurants.name: Contracorrent Bar & Bistro
restaurants.description: Passion-driven Italian ownership with an excellent natural wine focus; one of the most personal and welcoming neighbourhood bistros near Arc de Triomf.
restaurants.quote: Passion-driven Italian ownership with an excellent natural wine focus; one of the most personal and welcoming neighbourhood bistros near Arc de Triomf.

restaurants.name: Mikan
restaurants.description: North-east Asian lunch boxes and small plates paired with low-intervention natural wines in a relaxed Eixample Esquerra setting.
restaurants.quote: North-east Asian lunch boxes and small plates paired with low-intervention natural wines in a relaxed Eixample Esquerra setting.

restaurants.name: Masa Vins
restaurants.description: 'Your living room but with a fridge full of natural wines'—the most relaxed and welcoming natural wine bar in Poblenou.
restaurants.quote: 'Your living room but with a fridge full of natural wines'—the most relaxed and welcoming natural wine bar in Poblenou.

restaurants.name: Ona
restaurants.description: An intimate six-seat venue with a constantly changing tasting menu; one of Barcelona's most singular and personal dining experiences.
restaurants.quote: An intimate six-seat venue with a constantly changing tasting menu; one of Barcelona's most singular and personal dining experiences.

restaurants.name: Fishology
restaurants.description: Uses a nose-to-tail fish philosophy with age-old fish cooking methods revived for a modern Eixample Esquerra audience.
restaurants.quote: Uses a nose-to-tail fish philosophy with age-old fish cooking methods revived for a modern Eixample Esquerra audience.

restaurants.name: Fonda Pepa
restaurants.description: Catalan classics sprinkled with Mexican-inspired surprises; a genuinely original combination that works brilliantly in this Gràcia setting.
restaurants.quote: Catalan classics sprinkled with Mexican-inspired surprises; a genuinely original combination that works brilliantly in this Gràcia setting.

restaurants.name: Lluritu
restaurants.description: Straightforward yet flavourful seafood dishes in a casual Gràcia spot beloved by locals; no fuss, all flavour.
restaurants.quote: Straightforward yet flavourful seafood dishes in a casual Gràcia spot beloved by locals; no fuss, all flavour.

restaurants.name: La Cova Fumada
restaurants.description: Long-established Barceloneta institution representing the real Barcelona—cash only, no reservations, and some of the freshest seafood in the city.
restaurants.quote: Long-established Barceloneta institution representing the real Barcelona—cash only, no reservations, and some of the freshest seafood in the city.

restaurants.name: Can Fisher
restaurants.description: Beachfront Poblenou venue featuring fresh seafood and paella specialties with an authentic neighbourhood feel and proximity to the sea.
restaurants.quote: Beachfront Poblenou venue featuring fresh seafood and paella specialties with an authentic neighbourhood feel and proximity to the sea.

restaurants.name: Morro Fi
restaurants.description: Represents the contemporary vermut scene at its best, with quality tapas and impeccable house vermouth at multiple city locations.
restaurants.quote: Represents the contemporary vermut scene at its best, with quality tapas and impeccable house vermouth at multiple city locations.

restaurants.name: Bar La Plata
restaurants.description: Operating since 1945 and still serving the same four tapas; an irreplaceable Gothic Quarter institution with zero pretension.
restaurants.quote: Operating since 1945 and still serving the same four tapas; an irreplaceable Gothic Quarter institution with zero pretension.

restaurants.name: Quimet y Quimet
restaurants.description: Always packed Poble Sec classic famous for the salmon and cream cheese tapa; a standing-room-only institution that never disappoints.
restaurants.quote: Always packed Poble Sec classic famous for the salmon and cream cheese tapa; a standing-room-only institution that never disappoints.

restaurants.name: Vaso de Oro
restaurants.description: Barceloneta specialty is solomillo con foie, served alongside the house-brewed craft beer; a standing-room institution with irreplaceable character.
restaurants.quote: Barceloneta specialty is solomillo con foie, served alongside the house-brewed craft beer; a standing-room institution with character.

restaurants.name: Cal Pep
restaurants.description: If you are into seafood, you must go to this Born classic; counter service and fresh fish define a decades-long Barcelona institution.
restaurants.quote: If you are into seafood, you must go to this Born classic; counter service and fresh fish define a decades-long Barcelona institution.

restaurants.name: Hermós, Bar de Peix
restaurants.description: Fantastic seafood dishes and natural wines inside the Llibertat market in Gràcia; one of the city's best market-counter experiences.
restaurants.quote: Fantastic seafood dishes and natural wines inside the Llibertat market in Gràcia; one of the city's best market-counter experiences.

restaurants.name: Alnorte
restaurants.description: Wonderfully charming Gràcia bar specialising in northern Spanish food with traditional cider service; a joyful neighbourhood discovery.
restaurants.quote: Wonderfully charming Gràcia bar specialising in northern Spanish food with traditional cider service; a joyful neighbourhood discovery.

restaurants.name: Antunez
restaurants.description: Friendly, laid-back Gràcia atmosphere with the duck and foie canelón as the signature dish worth ordering every single time.
restaurants.quote: Friendly, laid-back Gràcia atmosphere with the duck and foie canelón as the signature dish worth ordering every time.

restaurants.name: Bar Bodega l'Electricitat
restaurants.description: Wine poured straight from the barrel; a genuine old-timer Barceloneta spot that has changed almost nothing since it opened.
restaurants.quote: Wine poured straight from the barrel; a genuine old-timer Barceloneta spot that has changed almost nothing since it opened.

restaurants.name: Entrepanes Diaz
restaurants.description: Old-school Eixample Dreta aesthetic with bocata de calamares as the must-order specialty; a brilliant sandwich institution.
restaurants.quote: Old-school Eixample Dreta aesthetic with bocata de calamares as the must-order specialty; a brilliant sandwich institution.

restaurants.name: El Quim de la Boqueria
restaurants.description: Delightful market tapas cooked to order inside the Boqueria; one of the most atmospheric eating spots in Barcelona.
restaurants.quote: Delightful market tapas cooked to order inside the Boqueria Market; one of the most atmospheric eating spots in Barcelona.

restaurants.name: La Bombeta
restaurants.description: Good quality tapas at this classic Barceloneta spot; famous for the bomba—the fried meat croquette that likely originated here.
restaurants.quote: Good quality tapas at this classic Barceloneta neighbourhood spot; famous for the bomba (fried meat croquette) that likely originated here.

restaurants.name: Can Paixano
restaurants.description: A true Barceloneta classic with cheap, quality cava and simple, tasty tapas; always heaving and always worth the jostle.
restaurants.quote: A true Barceloneta classic with cheap, quality cava and simple, tasty tapas; always heaving and always worth the jostle.

restaurants.name: Bar Bocata
restaurants.description: Famous for its tortilla with caramelised onion; vintage charm and a loyal neighbourhood following in Sarrià-Sant Gervasi.
restaurants.quote: Famous for its tortilla with caramelised onion; vintage charm and a loyal neighbourhood following in Sarrià-Sant Gervasi.

restaurants.name: Bar Canyí
restaurants.description: High-quality tapas with a relaxed, welcoming vibe at this popular Sant Antoni neighbourhood bar.
restaurants.quote: High-quality tapas with a relaxed, welcoming vibe at this popular Sant Antoni neighbourhood bar.

restaurants.name: Tangana
restaurants.description: Tasty tapas made with great ingredients matched with good wines; a solid and convivial Gràcia address.
restaurants.quote: Tasty tapas made with great ingredients and matched with good wines; a solid and convivial Gràcia address.

restaurants.name: Bar Restaurant Ginés
restaurants.description: Platters of shellfish and fish at good prices—'safates de marisc i peix a bon preu'—at this reliable neighbourhood seafood bar near Cinema Phenomena.
restaurants.quote: Platters of shellfish and fish at good prices—'safates de marisc i peix a bon preu'—at this reliable neighbourhood seafood bar near Phenomena Cinema.

restaurants.name: Bodega Can Ros
restaurants.description: Historic establishment since 1971 serving calamars a la romana, bunyols de bacallà, and truites de patates near Cinema Phenomena.
restaurants.quote: Historic establishment since 1971 serving calamars a la romana, bunyols de bacallà, and truites de patates near Cinema Phenomena.

restaurants.name: Sartoria Panatieri
restaurants.description: Named second-best pizzeria in the world in 2024; the Encarnació 51 address by Rafa Panatieri and Jorge Sastre is among the world's most acclaimed.
restaurants.quote: Named second-best pizzeria in the world in 2024; the Encarnació 51 address by Rafa Panatieri and Jorge Sastre is unmissable.

restaurants.name: Assalto
restaurants.description: Catalan small plates and wine at Nou de la Rambla 44, with continuous kitchen service Friday through Monday near La Filmoteca.
restaurants.quote: Wine and Catalan small plates at Nou de la Rambla 44, with continuous kitchen service Friday through Monday near La Filmoteca.

restaurants.name: Casa Leopoldo
restaurants.description: Historic Raval dining room at Sant Rafael 24; a long-standing institution in the neighbourhood that predates the area's transformation.
restaurants.quote: Historic Raval dining room at Sant Rafael 24; a long-standing institution in the neighbourhood that predates the area's gentrification.

restaurants.name: Suculent
restaurants.description: Contemporary Catalan cooking at Rambla del Raval 45; a quality dining option near La Filmoteca with a loyal following.
restaurants.quote: Contemporary Catalan cooking at Rambla del Raval 45; a quality dining option recommended for the area near La Filmoteca.

restaurants.name: Louro
restaurants.description: Best Galician gastronomy in an overlooked corner—'racó desconegut'—at the Centre Gallec on Rambla dels Caputxins; a genuine neighbourhood secret.
restaurants.quote: Best Galician gastronomy in an overlooked corner—'racó desconegut'—at the Centre Gallec on Rambla dels Caputxins; a genuine neighbourhood secret.

restaurants.name: Casa Xica
restaurants.description: A creative blend of Asian and Catalan cooking—'cuina asiàtica i catalana'—at França Xica 20 in Poble Sec near Montjuïc venues.
restaurants.quote: A creative blend of Asian and Catalan cooking—'cuina asiàtica i catalana'—at França Xica 20 in Poble Sec near Montjuïc venues.

restaurants.name: Margarit
restaurants.description: Greek and Mediterranean coastal cuisine—'cuina grega i de tota la llera del Mediterrani'—at Margarit 58 in Poble Sec.
restaurants.quote: Greek and Mediterranean coastal cuisine—'cuina grega i de tota la llera del Mediterrani'—at Margarit 58 in Poble Sec.

restaurants.name: Petit Montjuïc
restaurants.description: Algerian-Catalan fusion cooking—'cuina algerianocatalana'—at Sant Isidre 2 in Poble Sec; a genuinely original combination unique to Barcelona.
restaurants.quote: Algerian-Catalan fusion cooking—'cuina algerianocatalana'—at Sant Isidre 2 in Poble Sec; a genuinely original combination unique to Barcelona.

restaurants.name: Zaytun
restaurants.description: An excellent gastronomic proposition—'proposta gastronòmica excel·lent'—at Guadiana 40 in Sants, near the Sala Flyhard theatre.
restaurants.quote: An excellent gastronomic proposition—'proposta gastronòmica excel·lent'—at Guadiana 40 in Sants, near the Sala Flyhard theatre.

restaurants.name: Fat Veggies
restaurants.description: Run by Venezuelans Juan and Aquiles Martini using locally sourced organic vegetables and natural wines; 'like a cult, converting meat-eaters into devout veggie lovers.'
restaurants.quote: Run by Venezuelans Juan and Aquiles Martini using locally sourced organic vegetables and natural wines; 'like a cult, converting meat-eaters into devout veggie lovers.'

restaurants.name: Buriti
restaurants.description: Authentic Brazilian cuisine including moqueca, picanha, acarajés, and feijoada; 'a balm for saudade' with elevated quality and professional execution.
restaurants.quote: Authentic Brazilian cuisine including moqueca, picanha, acarajés, and feijoada; 'a balm for saudade' with elevated quality and genuine professionalism.

restaurants.name: Bruma
restaurants.description: Created by Soma founders at Aribau 31; 'fusiona la cocina española y la catalana' with minimalist presentation and accessible pricing.
restaurants.quote: Created by Soma founders, this Aribau 31 restaurant 'fusiona la cocina española y la catalana' with minimalist presentation and accessible pricing.

restaurants.name: Fidelio
restaurants.description: Trendy, family-oriented trattoria at Beethoven 14 featuring New York-style pizza and pasta dishes; 'desenfadado' and very Instagrammable.
restaurants.quote: Trendy, family-oriented trattoria at Beethoven 14 featuring New York-style pizza and pasta dishes; 'desenfadado' and very Instagrammable.

restaurants.name: Garum
restaurants.description: A neighbourhood restaurant at Vilarós 3 offering 'elaboradísimas croquetas' and seasonal dishes, with a weekday lunch menu at €16.
restaurants.quote: A neighbourhood restaurant offering 'elaboradísimas croquetas' and seasonal dishes, with a weekday lunch menu at €16 on Carrer de Vilarós.

restaurants.name: Casa Chiquita
restaurants.description: Terrace spot on Av. Diagonal 557 featuring classic tapas and vermut in a tranquil, unhurried atmosphere in Les Corts.
restaurants.quote: Terrace spot on Av. Diagonal 557 featuring classic tapas and vermut in a tranquil, unhurried atmosphere—'ambiente tranquilo'—in Les Corts.

restaurants.name: Aüc Bar
restaurants.description: By Joan Martínez and Takeshi Somekawa, honouring 'las tapas y los platos catalanes más icónicos' with local products at Plaça del Camp 7.
restaurants.quote: By Joan Martínez and Takeshi Somekawa, honouring 'las tapas y los platos catalanes más icónicos' with local products at Plaça del Camp 7.

restaurants.name: Fogón del Castellano y Leonés
restaurants.description: Regional classics like torreznos and callos alongside contemporary dishes; daily menu €16 and weekend menu €27 at Passeig de Torras i Bages 139.
restaurants.quote: Regional classics like torreznos and callos alongside contemporary dishes; daily menu €16 and weekend menu €27 at Passeig de Torras i Bages 139.

restaurants.name: La Bodegueta de Sant Andreu
restaurants.description: Recently awarded the Barcelona Restauració prize for neighbourhood integration; known for multiple croqueta varieties and artisanal local products on Rambla de Fabra i Puig.
restaurants.quote: Recently awarded the Barcelona Restauració prize for neighbourhood integration; known for multiple croqueta varieties and artisanal local products on Rambla de Fabra i Puig.

restaurants.name: L'Empanat
restaurants.description: Combines traditional patatas bravas and eggs with charcoal Josper-oven hamburgers and seasonal offerings at Carrer de Monlau 60.
restaurants.quote: Combines traditional patatas bravas and eggs with charcoal Josper-oven hamburgers and seasonal offerings at Carrer de Monlau 60 in Sant Andreu.

restaurants.name: L'Arrossat de l'Empanat
restaurants.description: Specialises in paella variants and fideuà at Plaça de Masadas 1; 'each grain reflecting Mediterranean essence' according to the kitchen's philosophy.
restaurants.quote: Specialises in paella variants and fideuà at Plaça de Masadas 1; 'each grain reflecting Mediterranean essence' according to the kitchen's philosophy.

restaurants.name: La Marcelina
restaurants.description: One Repsol Guide star; daily menu at €17.50; chef-led tribute to 'authentic, honest cooking' using proximity-sourced ingredients at Costa Rica 24.
restaurants.quote: One Repsol Guide star; daily menu at €17.50; chef-led tribute to 'authentic, honest cooking' using proximity-sourced ingredients at Costa Rica 24.

restaurants.name: Atipical
restaurants.description: By Matteo Bertozzi; 'cocina con ingenio, técnica y sensibilidad'—one of the notable openings of 2025 that impressed Barcelona food writers.
restaurants.quote: By Matteo Bertozzi; 'cocina con ingenio, técnica y sensibilidad'—one of the notable new openings of 2025 according to Barcelona food writers.

restaurants.name: Direkte
restaurants.description: By Arnau Muñío; the relocated and expanded format of this much-praised restaurant on Carrer de París, with greater ambition in the new space.
restaurants.quote: By Arnau Muñío; the relocated and expanded format of this much-praised Barcelona restaurant, now with greater ambition and larger premises on Carrer de París.

restaurants.name: Agreste Mar
restaurants.description: Mediterranean-inspired Italian-Catalan fusion at the Serras Barcelona Hotel in the Born; one of 2025's notable new hotel restaurant openings.
restaurants.quote: Mediterranean-inspired Italian-Catalan fusion at the Serras Barcelona Hotel; one of 2025's notable new dining openings in the Born area.

restaurants.name: Fonda Balmes
restaurants.description: A traditional Catalan restaurant on Balmes that grew steadily in popularity throughout 2025; solid neighbourhood cooking at honest prices.
restaurants.quote: A traditional Catalan restaurant on Balmes that grew steadily in popularity throughout 2025; solid neighbourhood cooking at honest prices.

restaurants.name: Ippudo
restaurants.description: The global ramen chain's Barcelona interpretation; widely noted among 2025's notable new openings for bringing serious Japanese ramen culture to the city.
restaurants.quote: The global ramen chain's Barcelona interpretation; widely noted among 2025's notable new openings for bringing serious Japanese ramen culture to the city.

restaurants.name: Fronda Pasaje
restaurants.description: 'Un espacio on el menjar i el coneixement van de bracet'—a space where food and knowledge walk together; a cultural-gastronomy hybrid address.
restaurants.quote: 'Un espacio on el menjar i el coneixement van de bracet'—a Barcelona space where food and knowledge walk together; a cultural-gastronomy hybrid.

restaurants.name: Provisions Gresca
restaurants.description: Curated cured meats by the team behind Gresca; a focused charcuterie specialist that became a key address in the 2025 bar-food revival.
restaurants.quote: Curated cured meats by the team behind Gresca; a focused charcuterie specialist that became a key address in the 2025 bar-food revival.

restaurants.name: Mineral
restaurants.description: Project by Oliver Peña and Cristina Losada; a highly anticipated 2026 opening from two of Barcelona's most respected young chefs.
restaurants.quote: Project by Oliver Peña and Cristina Losada; a highly anticipated 2026 opening from two of Barcelona's most respected young chefs.

restaurants.name: Orobianco Barcelona
restaurants.description: Fine dining project with Paolo Casagrande (of Lasarte) as gastronomic director; one of the most anticipated openings of early 2026.
restaurants.quote: Fine dining project with Paolo Casagrande (of Lasarte) as gastronomic director; one of the most anticipated openings of early 2026.

restaurants.name: La Parada Torres
restaurants.description: Collaboration between Sergio and Javier Torres at Mercat de Santa Caterina; a spring 2026 debut from two celebrated Catalan chefs.
restaurants.quote: Collaboration between Sergio and Javier Torres opening at Mercat de Santa Caterina; a spring 2026 debut from two celebrated Catalan chefs.

restaurants.name: Masia del Tibidabo
restaurants.description: Rafa Zafra's Tibidabo project focusing on seasonal, local ingredients in a landmark hilltop setting above the city.
restaurants.quote: Rafa Zafra's Tibidabo project focusing on seasonal, local ingredients in a landmark hilltop setting above the city.

restaurants.name: Hermanos Alam's Taco
restaurants.description: 'Un templo del taco al pastor' with specialised salsas; a Barcelona taquería bringing genuine Mexican taco culture to the city.
restaurants.quote: 'Un templo del taco al pastor' with specialised salsas; a Barcelona taquería bringing genuine Mexican taco culture to the city.

restaurants.name: Finca Nebot
restaurants.description: By Leo Chechelnitskiy; a Poblenou restaurant with emphasis on classic Catalan dishes and a commitment to quality local products.
restaurants.quote: By Leo Chechelnitskiy; a Poblenou restaurant with emphasis on classic Catalan dishes and a commitment to product quality.

restaurants.name: Super Auto
restaurants.description: By Ronit Stern; a 2026 opening in Eixample that generated early buzz among Barcelona food writers and restaurant professionals.
restaurants.quote: By Ronit Stern; a 2026 opening in Eixample that generated early buzz among Barcelona food writers and restaurant professionals.

restaurants.name: Mercado Central
restaurants.description: Cevichería by Pablo Ortega in Poble Sec; a focused Peruvian concept built around ceviche and the marine traditions of Lima.
restaurants.quote: Cevichería by Pablo Ortega in Poble Sec; a focused Peruvian concept built around ceviche and the marine traditions of Lima.

restaurants.name: Bottega Bernacca
restaurants.description: By Gerard Barberan with Michelin-level experience from Brazil; a fusion project blending European and South American culinary sensibilities.
restaurants.quote: By Gerard Barberan with Michelin-level experience from Brazil; a fusion project that blends European and South American culinary sensibilities.

restaurants.name: Cresta Negra
restaurants.description: Omar Malpartida's roasted chicken-focused Peruvian concept; a more casual and accessible counterpart to his other Barcelona projects.
restaurants.quote: Omar Malpartida's roasted chicken-focused Peruvian concept; a more casual and accessible counterpart to his other Barcelona projects.

restaurants.name: Arcano
restaurants.description: Occupies 17th-century former cathedral stables at Mercaders 10; chef Nicolás Limarino updates historic Catalan recipes—brioche with country sausage, braised beef cheeks in rancio wine—with modern technique.
restaurants.quote: Occupies 17th-century former cathedral stables at Mercaders 10; chef Nicolás Limarino updates historic Catalan recipes—brioche with country sausage, braised beef cheeks in rancio wine—with modern technique.

restaurants.name: Kiosko Universal
restaurants.description: Over 50 years operating inside La Boqueria under third-generation management; fresh tuna tataki, razor clams with foie, and grilled Galician-style octopus.
restaurants.quote: Over 50 years operating inside La Boqueria under third-generation management; fresh tuna tataki, razor clams with foie, and grilled Galician-style octopus from market stall to plate.

restaurants.name: Tapas Lobito
restaurants.description: Recently opened by Grupo Tragaluz at Porxos d'en Xifré; bar combining Iberian ham croquettes and fried artichokes with a dedicated sushi counter and foosball table.
restaurants.quote: Recently opened by Grupo Tragaluz at Porxos d'en Xifré; bar concept combining Iberian ham croquettes and fried artichokes with a dedicated sushi counter and foosball table.

restaurants.name: Jazminos
restaurants.description: Small and welcoming Middle Eastern restaurant with an elegant approach and dinner menu under €30; a neighbourhood secret in Putxet.
restaurants.quote: Small and welcoming Middle Eastern restaurant with an elegant approach and dinner menu under €30; a neighbourhood secret in Putxet.

restaurants.name: Bar Fischer
restaurants.description: Honest cooking at affordable prices with charming, attentive staff; a reliable 2025 Eixample find that delivers quality without pretension.
restaurants.quote: Honest cooking at affordable prices with charming, attentive staff; a 2025 Eixample find that delivers reliable quality without pretension.

restaurants.name: Vibeyard
restaurants.description: Original menu with Portuguese touches and 10 house wines sourced directly from Lisbon vineyards; a singular natural wine bar in Gràcia.
restaurants.quote: Original menu with Portuguese touches and 10 house wines sourced directly from Lisbon vineyards; a singular natural wine bar in Gràcia.

restaurants.name: Fiffty-Fiffty
restaurants.description: Quality fast food better than the famous competitors; a Poblenou spot that elevated the burger-and-chips format with noticeably better ingredients.
restaurants.quote: Quality fast food better than the famous competitors; a Poblenou spot that elevated the burger-and-chips format with noticeably better ingredients.

restaurants.name: Esnaf
restaurants.description: Daily-changing healthy plates with a strong takeaway focus; reflects Poblenou's growing appetite for honest, wholesome food.
restaurants.quote: Daily-changing healthy plates with a strong takeaway focus; a Poblenou spot that reflects the neighbourhood's growing creative-class appetite for honest, wholesome food.

restaurants.name: Bar Veracruz
restaurants.description: Historic décor preserved intact; known for generous fork breakfasts and excellent midday dishes that honour the classic Barcelona bar tradition.
restaurants.quote: Historic décor preserved intact; known for generous fork breakfasts and excellent midday dishes that honour the classic Barcelona bar tradition.

restaurants.name: Bodega Manolo
restaurants.description: Classic Gràcia tavern with noticeably improved dishes under new ownership; the neighbourhood bodega format done with greater care and quality.
restaurants.quote: Classic Gràcia tavern with noticeably improved dishes under new ownership; the neighbourhood bodega format done with greater care and quality.

restaurants.name: Bar Casi
restaurants.description: Perfect for lunch; respects the historic character of its Gràcia space with honest traditional cooking and a loyal neighbourhood clientele.
restaurants.quote: Perfect for lunch; respects the historic character of its Gràcia space with honest traditional cooking and a loyal neighbourhood clientele.

restaurants.name: Bodega Nulles
restaurants.description: Authentic vermut selection with traditional tapas; one of 2025's recommended Eixample aperitif bars for a genuine vermouth ritual.
restaurants.quote: Authentic vermut selection with traditional tapas; one of 2025's recommended Eixample aperitif bars for a genuine vermouth ritual.

restaurants.name: Bar Bruno
restaurants.description: Small and welcoming Sarrià-Sant Gervasi wine bar with an excellent selection; the kind of neighbourhood bar you want to discover yourself.
restaurants.quote: Small and welcoming Sarrià-Sant Gervasi wine bar with an excellent selection; the kind of neighbourhood bar you want to discover yourself.

restaurants.name: Barra Oso
restaurants.description: Óscar Álvarez's intimate ten-seat seafood bar at Muntaner 248 with candlelit atmosphere; focuses on creative preparations like cured serviola alongside fresh fish dishes.
restaurants.quote: Óscar Álvarez's intimate ten-seat seafood bar at Muntaner 248 with candlelit atmosphere; focuses on fish dishes and creative preparations like cured serviola.

restaurants.name: Bar Alegría
restaurants.description: Tomás Abellán's Gràcia location at Torrent de l'olla 77, maintaining the '1970s allure' of the original; features ibérico pork, cockles, and Maresme peas with butifarra.
restaurants.quote: Tomás Abellán's Gràcia location at Torrent de l'olla 77, maintaining the '1970s allure' of the original; features ibérico pork, cockles, and Maresme peas with butifarra.

restaurants.name: Barra M
restaurants.description: Omar Malpartida's intimate ten-seat bar at Viladomat 249 'revindicating omakase through a deep Nikkei perspective' blending Japanese technique with vibrant Peruvian ingredients.
restaurants.quote: Omar Malpartida's intimate ten-seat bar at Viladomat 249 'revindicating omakase through a deep Nikkei perspective' blending Japanese technique with vibrant Peruvian ingredients.

restaurants.name: Taberna Nardi
restaurants.description: Like a rowdy fish-market stall: fresh razor clams, mussels with parsley butter, and chargrilled red tuna neck in a tiny Born bar.
restaurants.quote: Like a rowdy fish-market stall: fresh razor clams, mussels with parsley butter, and chargrilled red tuna neck in a tiny Born bar.

restaurants.name: Mundial Bar
restaurants.description: Historic haunt relaunched as affordable seafood bar; dinner for two costs €50, with vintage literary and boxing memorabilia setting the scene.
restaurants.quote: Historic haunt relaunched as affordable seafood bar; dinner for two costs €50, with vintage literary and boxing memorabilia setting the scene.

restaurants.name: Al Grano Bistro
restaurants.description: Cosy Eixample spot featuring rich wild boar pappardelle, pillowy ossobuco ravioli, and house-made tiramisu; serious Italian cooking in an unfussy setting.
restaurants.quote: Cosy Eixample spot featuring rich wild boar pappardelle, pillowy ossobuco ravioli, and house-made tiramisu; serious Italian cooking in an unfussy setting.

restaurants.name: Bar Super
restaurants.description: Sister to Bar Brutal; cured horsemeat cecina with wildly expressive cloudy orange wines from €4.50—the best value natural wine bar in the Santa Caterina area.
restaurants.quote: Sister to Bar Brutal; cured horsemeat cecina with wildly expressive cloudy orange wines from €4.50—the best value natural wine bar in the Santa Caterina area.

restaurants.name: Paloma
restaurants.description: Modern Mexican featuring green seabass aguachile with authentic Oaxacan cheese; serious Mexican flavours executed with ambition in an elegant Gràcia setting.
restaurants.quote: Modern Mexican featuring green seabass aguachile with authentic Oaxacan cheese; serious Mexican flavours in an elegant Gràcia setting.

restaurants.name: Chambacú
restaurants.description: Tasting menu €55–€95; 'modern interpretation of Colombian cooking' fusing Indigenous, Spanish, and African flavours with ambition and considerable technique.
restaurants.quote: Tasting menu €55–€95; 'modern interpretation of Colombian cooking' fusing Indigenous, Spanish, and African flavours with ambition and technique.
